title: T2 Corporate Statistics – 2020 Edition (2013-2018 tax years) - Open Government Portal
content:
## T2 Corporate Statistics – 2020 Edition (2013-2018 tax years)
The corporate statistical tables provide key tax and accounting information as of December 31, 2018, for all T2 returns that were assessed or reassessed for corporations with tax years that fall within the 2013 to 2018 calendar years.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Canada Revenue Agency
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Explanatory Notes HTML English website HTML Explore More information Go to resource
- Explanatory Notes HTML French website HTML Explore More information Go to resource
